title: MF24KU & Magitech Sample Modpack
description: An example modpack for MF24KU and Magitech play.
body:
## Concept
This pack lets you experience the majority of **[MF24KU](https://modrinth.com/mod/miragefairy2024-kakera-unofficial)** and **[Magitech](https://modrinth.com/mod/magitech_mod)** to the fullest, in a single, cohesive world.
Built around these two main mods, it adds complementary mods for industry, magic, transportation, life, decoration, and utilities so progression feels seamless.

### MF24KU - Representation of the MirageFairy World
MirageFairy unfolds in a science fiction world governed by fantastical physical laws.
The storyline of MirageFairy2024 is set on a planet where plants have become wild after being modified by the ancient civilization known as the Fairy Research Institute.
- Original crops and cross-breeding to improve varieties
- Possess fairies obtained from items such as Mirage Flowers and gain various passive effects
- Tools crafted from various mod-specific materials

### Magitech - Fusion of Technology and Magic
Magitech is a mod that constructs magical theory through science and treats mana like electricity.
It blends the romanticism of the Industrial Revolution with the mystique of arcane arts.
- Tools crafted through part synthesis
- Magic-based combat
- Alchemical crafting

## Mod Composition
- **Main**: MF24KU / Magitech
- **Industry**: Create / Create Crafts & Additions / Create: Better Motors / Create: Cultivation Craft / Applied Energistics 2 / MEGA Cells
- **Magic**: Ars Nouveau / Ars Nouveau’s Flavors & Delight
- **Transportation**: Railcraft Reborn / Immersive Aircraft
- **Life**: Farmer’s Delight / Expanded Delight / TofuCraftReload / Tofu Create / TofuDelight
- **Decoration**: Chisel Reborn / Supplementaries / Supplementaries Squared
- **Utilities**: Jade / JourneyMap / JEI / REI / Sophisticated Backpacks

## Use with the “MF24KU Test Server”
This modpack can be used as the prerequisite client mod environment for connecting to the “MF24KU Test Server.”
Client-only mods can be added at your discretion.
